use_cases: Hero section for SaaS landing pages with interactive mouse-following line animation
Creative portfolio sites seeking dynamic visual engagement on initial load
Product launch pages that want to showcase modern, tech-forward aesthetics
Developer tool landing pages emphasizing innovation through physics-based animation
Agency websites looking for distinctive animated hero elements
ai_summary: An interactive hero component featuring a physics-based spring simulation that creates flowing, connected line animations following mouse movement. The canvas-rendered animation uses nodes with spring forces, friction, and dampening to produce organic, wave-like motion. Ideal for modern SaaS, developer tools, and creative agency landing pages seeking engaging visual first impressions.
